name: PAU_seripauperin_family
description: Seripauperin (PAU) gene family in S. cerevisiae S288C. 23 paralogs (PAU1-PAU24) distributed across nearly all subtelomeric regions of the 16 chromosomes. Encode ~120 aa seripauperin proteins (cell-wall mannoproteins) repressed by oxygen. Paralogs share 70-99% nucleotide identity; the most recently duplicated PAU pairs are indistinguishable at the short-read level.

architecture.internal_structure: single-exon ~360 bp ORF; one copy per subtelomere
